practice.name: Problem 12 (2020 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: Triangle ABC is isosceles with AB = AC. Medians BD and CE are perpendicular to each other, and BD = CE = 12. What is the area of triangle ABC?

practice.name: Problem 12 (2018 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: Line segment AB is a diameter of a circle with center O and radius 6. Point C, not equal to A or B, lies on the circle. As point C moves around the circle, the centroid of triangle ABC traces out a closed curve. To the nearest positive integer, what is the area of the region bounded by this curve?

practice.name: Problem 13 (2018 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: Square ABCD has side length 1. Point P lies inside the square so that AP = 2BP = 2CP. The centroids of triangles ABP, BCP, CDP, and DAP are the vertices of a convex quadrilateral. What is the area of that quadrilateral?
